_comment: fixture for webgl_three — declares three.js + @react-three/fiber so the type-detector picks webgl_three. Intentionally omits 'main' and 'exports' so library_node does NOT match. No express/koa/fastify/etc. so web_service_node does not match. No 'bin' so cli_node does not match. No 'ws' or 'socket.io' so websocket_server does not match.
name: scene-fixture
